title: Coney Island
summary: The New York setting of Episode 3, divided between a Black Tusk operation at the ballpark and a Cleaner presence at the amusement park.

claims.text: Episode 3 brings Division Agents back to New York, specifically Coney Island, for two main missions.
Black Tusk holds Vitaly Tchernenko at the Coney Island Ballpark.
Cleaners are active at the Coney Island Amusement Park.

paragraphs.text: Coney Island extends the conflict beyond Washington and divides Episode 3 between the rescue of Tchernenko from Black Tusk and a separate confrontation with the Cleaners.

verification.notes: Mission routes and collectible coordinates remain pending direct capture.
